generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://www.example.com/ontology#"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://www.example.com/dtdf-vocab"

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder measuring angular position for motor drive",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox measuring angular position",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current (I_M)",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance VelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance AccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular position data from motor encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredSecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular position data from secondary encoder",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredIMData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current (I_M) data trace",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity data trace",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VelocityDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured acceleration data trace",
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque data trace",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque output data",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for system structure",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for system internals",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkStribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkDahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkLuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model in Simulink",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AASDataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for data structuring",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for modeling",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for simulation",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, FrictionCompensationService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for data streaming",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for data structuring",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for motion control",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionCompensationService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization in dashboard",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of friction models (white-box and black-box)",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossDetectionInsight, DataTraceabilityInsight
]

instance FrictionCompensationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhancement of robot motion accuracy through friction compensation",
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterUpdateAction
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of system data in dashboard"
]

instance FrictionLossDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction loss detection leading to control parameter updates for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance DataTraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Traceability of data origins for understanding physical system behavior"
]

instance ControlParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control parameter updates for improved motion accuracy",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor in the first axis"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel in the first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in the first axis"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller commanding permanent magnet synchronous motor and gearboxes to adjust torque and angular velocity for motion control"
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot",
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; digital shadow operates with one-way data flow from physical to virtual only, as per Kritzinger et al. [32] reference."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with sensor data streamed via MQTT; no specific time rate specified beyond real-time operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of physical robot sensors, MQTT communication, Simulink-based processing components, AAS for metadata, and dashboard visualization integrating all data traces and models for friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated; real-time monitoring and analysis of the physical system during operational phase."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated vs measured data; white-box analytical models and black-box data-driven models used for accuracy improvement, with traceability of data generation processes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for Industry 4.0 standards compliance and SysML for model-based systems engineering."
]
